01 — About Me

About Me

Code, data &
financial curiosity.

I'm a Computer Science Engineering student at Lovely Professional University with a genuine love for problem solving — whether it's detecting deadlocks in OS-level systems or uncovering signals in a messy GST dataset.

I care about writing clean, maintainable code and building tools that are genuinely useful. My interests span full-stack development, data analysis, and financial technology.

Outside of coding I follow macro-economic trends, read about markets, contribute to open source, and grind through tough LeetCode problems.

Interests

🖥 Software Engineering 📊 Data Analysis 💹 FinTech 🌐 Open Source 🤖 Machine Learning 📈 Stock Markets

04 — Projects

Projects

Things I've Built

Real projects across systems, data, and finance.

🔒
Python · OS
Python · Operating Systems

Automated Deadlock Detector

Models the Resource Allocation Graph for multi-process systems and detects circular wait conditions using DFS-based cycle detection. Generates a visual deadlock chain report.

PythonGraph TheoryDFSOS Concepts
View on GitHub
📊
Data Analysis
Data Analysis · GST

GST Return Filing Trends

Exploratory analysis of state-wise GST filing patterns across India — uncovering regional compliance gaps, seasonal trends, and anomalies in an interactive visual report.

PythonPandasSeabornEDA
View on GitHub
💹
In Development
React · Finance

Finance Calculator App

Full-featured personal finance calculator covering SIP, EMI, compound interest, loan amortisation, and tax estimation — making complex financial maths accessible.

ReactJavaScriptTailwind CSSFinTech
Actively building
🤖
ML · AI Applications
Python · Machine Learning

Student Placement Predictor

ML model that predicts student placement likelihood and generates a readiness score (0–100) from academic, skill, and experiential factors. Achieved 78% accuracy with XGBoost, deployed as an interactive Streamlit app with real-time predictions and personalised improvement suggestions.

Python XGBoost Random Forest Streamlit Scikit-learn
View on GitHub
🍽️
Power BI · Data Analysis
Power BI · Excel · DAX

Restaurant Intelligence Dashboard

Analysed 8,369 NYC restaurants to uncover revenue trends, customer behaviour, and location-based insights. Cleaned and transformed raw data, standardised location records, and built interactive visualisations across revenue, cuisine, pricing, ratings, and reservation trends.

Power BI Excel DAX Data Modeling EDA
View on GitHub
